claims.quote: Cardiology FellowshipGastroenterology FellowshipHematology/Oncology FellowshipPulmonary & Critical Care Medicine Fellowship
claims.claimText: TBHC lists Cardiology, Gastroenterology, Hematology/Oncology, and Pulmonary & Critical Care Medicine fellowships in GME nav.
claims.limitations: Navigation-context listing of GME fellowships; future-lane only.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on body-paragraph IM residency content; fellowship names appear in concatenated nav near the bottom.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: ACGME requirement: All residents must complete a performance improvement projects related to quality improvement, patient safety and cost-effectiveness.
claims.claimText: Residency program describes ACGME-mandated quality improvement / patient safety project requirement.
claims.limitations: ACGME accreditation signal; future-lane only.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not capture the explicit ACGME accreditation signal, which is a distinct future-lane GME marker.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Clinical Aﬃliate of The Mount Sinai Hospital, Academic Aﬃliate of The Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai
claims.claimText: TBHC is a clinical affiliate of Mount Sinai Hospital and academic affiliate of Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai.
claims.limitations: Affiliation footer statement; distinct from A1's GME Research Day claim. Future-lane only.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured Mount Sinai only in the GME Research Day context and missed the formal site-footer academic-affiliation statement naming Icahn.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: A minimum of one research project to be completed during the three years of training.
claims.claimText: Internal Medicine residency requires a minimum of one research project across three years of training.
claims.limitations: Residency program requirement; future-lane only.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the general research-as-training claim but did not surface the explicit one-project / three-year quantitative requirement.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Health Care Jobs in Brooklyn, NYNew and Returning CandidatesVisit the External Career Center if you would like to apply for a position or check the status of a current application.
claims.claimText: TBHC operates an external career center for job applications.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote:
What are the employment options offered at The Brooklyn Hospital Center?
We offer different employment options to fit every schedule. These options include Full Time; Part Time; Per Diem; Per Session; and Temporary.
claims.claimText: Employment options include Full Time, Part Time, Per Diem, Per Session, and Temporary.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Visit the Brooklyn Talent Pipeline to provide us with your resume and contact information if you can't find an open position but would like to be considered should a position become available.
claims.claimText: Brooklyn Talent Pipeline accepts resumes for future consideration.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Current EmployeesVisit the Internal Career Center if you would like to apply for a position or check the status of a current application.
claims.claimText: TBHC operates an Internal Career Center for current-employee applications, separate from the External Career Center pathway.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the External Career Center pathway (c1) but skipped the parallel Internal Career Center pathway for current employees mentioned in the adjacent sentence.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Clinical Aﬃliate of The Mount Sinai Hospital, Academic Aﬃliate of The Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai
claims.claimText: TBHC self-identifies as Clinical Affiliate of The Mount Sinai Hospital and Academic Affiliate of Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai.
claims.limitations: Footer-level affiliation statement; does not by itself describe a visiting student or observership pathway. Affiliation does not imply USCE eligibility.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 mentioned this in unresolveds but did not emit as a structured claim; Mount Sinai academic-affiliation status is itself a substantive signal worth capturing for A3 follow-up on a possible affiliated-only restriction.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: If you need assistance with completing the online application, please contact our database administrator at 718-250-6293.
claims.claimText: Application-support phone contact at TBHC HR database administrator is 718-250-6293.
claims.limitations: Phone is for general job-application support, not for clinical experience / observership inquiries.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the External/Internal Career Center pathways but omitted the explicit phone contact for application assistance.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only
